message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber off
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor Black
  LifeLineBorderColor Black
  LifeLineShadowColor none
  ActorBorderColor Black
  ActorShadowColor none
}
actor alice
actor bob

== message 1 ==
alice -> bob : message 1
bob -->> alice : ok

== message 2 ==
alice -> bob : message 2
bob -->> alice : ok

== message 3 ==
alice -> bob : message 3
bob --> alice : ok
@enduml
```
